architecture.summary: Extends existing improve endpoint with instruct mode, reuses SkillImprovePanel diff pattern

integrations.summary: N/A - no external integrations, uses existing LLM client

ui-ux.summary: Trigger-only prompt bar via button/Cmd+K, auto-focus, Escape dismiss, bottom-panel unified diff with Apply/Discard

performance.summary: N/A - single LLM call per request, same as existing improve

security.summary: N/A - local dev tool, no auth changes

edge-cases.summary: Uses in-editor content including unsaved changes, disable submit while loading, no concurrent requests
